course_subtitle: Codes and Standards Definitions and History
topics: length measurement: tape, ruler, calipers, gauge blocks
weight/mass measurement: gravimetric, fire assay for gold
time measurement: mechanical to quartz to atomic clocks
physical_props_used: grinder and steel rod samples (1018, 1045, 440C, M50, alloy steels)

19 half-inch balls of various materials (brass, aluminum, low carbon steel, 300/440 stainless, tool steel, two rubbers including Viton, Torlon, acrylic, polystyrene, tungsten carbide, aluminum oxide, silicon nitride, nylon, etc.)
Farberware stainless pot (304 base, magnetic upper)
